terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Moatrics ("the Service"), an educational research platform operated by Moatrics. By creating an account or otherwise using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.p: You must be at least 18 years old and able to form a legally binding contract to use the Service. Moatrics is currently invite-only during early access and access may be revoked at our discretion.

You are responsible for safeguarding your invite code, login credentials, and any activity that occurs under your account. Invite codes are single-use and non-transferable. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

You agree not to (a) scrape, mirror, or redistribute Service data; (b) use the Service to provide regulated investment advice to others; (c) attempt to reverse-engineer, disable, or interfere with the Service; or (d) use the Service for any unlawful purpose.

Paid tiers are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis. You may cancel at any time and your access will continue until the end of the current billing period. Fees already paid are non-refundable except where required by law.

All content, software, branding, and visual design produced by Moatrics remain our property. You receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Service for your personal research purposes only.

The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Moatrics is an educational research platform and is not a registered investment advisor. To the maximum extent permitted by law, our aggregate liability arising out of or relating to the Service is limited to the fees you paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.

We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notice. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
If you have questions about these Terms, please reach out at the address below.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Moatrics ("we", "us") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use the Service. We collect only what we need to operate the platform and never sell your data.

sections.p: We collect the email address and password (hashed) you provide at signup, the invite code used to register, and the watchlist, journal entries, and settings you create inside the Service. We also collect minimal access logs (timestamp, IP address) for security and abuse prevention.

We use your information to (a) provide and maintain the Service, (b) authenticate you and protect your account, (c) respond to support requests, and (d) communicate important changes such as new features, billing, or policy updates.

We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with infrastructure providers (cloud hosting, email delivery) strictly to operate the Service, and only when legally required to do so. Aggregated, non-identifying analytics may be shared publicly.

Passwords are stored using industry-standard hashing. Per-user research data is isolated on our servers. No security measure is perfect — please use a strong, unique password and notify us immediately of any suspicious activity.

You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by emailing us. We will respond within 30 days. Deleting your account permanently removes your watchlist, journal, and account record.
We use first-party cookies strictly to keep you signed in. We do not use third-party advertising cookies or cross-site tracking on the Service.
We may update this Privacy Policy as the Service evolves. Material changes will be communicated by email or in-app notice. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent revision.

disclaimer.title: Investment Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: Moatrics is an educational research platform. Nothing on this site is, or should be interpreted as, personalized investment, financial, tax, or legal advice. Please read the following carefully before using any data or analysis the Service provides.

sections.p: Moatrics does not provide investment advice or recommendations. Our screeners, valuations, scoring, and analyses are educational tools to assist your own research. We are not a registered investment advisor and do not offer brokerage, custodial, or portfolio management services.

All valuations and projections rely on assumptions about future growth, margins, and discount rates that may prove incorrect. Past performance is not indicative of future results. No metric on the Service guarantees a positive return.

All investing carries the risk of loss, including total loss of principal. Equity markets are volatile. Concentrated positions and options strategies carry materially elevated risk. Only invest capital you can afford to lose.

Financial data displayed on the Service is sourced from third-party providers (e.g. Yahoo Finance, SEC filings). We do not warrant the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any such data. You should independently verify any data point before acting on it.

Every investment decision should be made on the basis of your own research, your own financial situation, and where appropriate, consultation with a licensed financial professional. The presence of a stock on the Service is not a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold it.
Using the Service does not create a fiduciary, advisory, or attorney-client relationship between you and Moatrics.
